Subject: The Battle.net Holiday Sale is almost over, Skogix!

It's
your last chance to score deals on a selection of popular games
and more before the sale comes to a
close.
The
Holiday Sale ends
soon!
(
https://links.battle.net/f/a/dIyW26VKinpxqR98kCFrsg~~/AAQRxQA~~~
)                 The
Holiday Sale ends
soon!
Start
the new year right and save big,
Skogix!

Whether you're getting a gift1 for a friend or treating
yourself, save 20-65% off a selection of popular games and more
before the Battle.net® Holiday Sale ends on 1 January.


Will you embark on an epic journey in World of Warcraft®, be the
savior of Sanctuary in Diablo®, or drop into the fight with your
squad in Call of Duty®? Your next adventure begins on Battle.net.
